title: Gateway: Inter-mesh routing via Yggdrasil
description: Implement inter-mesh routing only after project-LICHEN-zt3c.2 defines per-node identity-preserving Yggdrasil participation. Local native 0200::/8 /128 host routes win. A participant may hand non-local native /128s to Yggdrasil under the owning node identity; 0300::/8 routed subnets, ULA, generic /7 forwarding, and gateway source spoofing are excluded.
